title: lunathyrium boryanum
intro: Lunathyrium boryanum, also known as the Himalayan fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lunathyrium boryanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lunathyrium boryanum typically involve decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various ailments.
